100hr_datasets_A.description: Exactly 100.0 h from four datasets (from cobot_magic_raw_lerobot_summary.md)

100hr_datasets_B.description: ~100.4 h from three large datasets (fewer roots to mount)

100hr_datasets_C.description: ~100.02 h across eight datasets (broader task mix)

200hr_datasets_A.description: ~200 h - Greedy by largest hours first (fewer dataset roots).

200hr_datasets_B.description: ~200 h - Greedy by smallest hours first (more tasks, many roots).

200hr_datasets_C.description: ~200 h - Random subset search minimizing distance to target hours (from cobot_magic_raw_lerobot_summary.md).
